TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Conv-farming_marang_furayang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: e masama'antu kiya panay tu piliso' isu tayra i oma'.
S.PHON: ə masamaʡantu kija panaj tu piɾiso~uʡ isu tajra i o~umaʡ.
S.FORM: e masama'antu kiya panay tu piliso' isu tayra i oma'.
S.PHON: ə masamaʡantu kija panaj tu piɾiso~uʡ isu tajra i o~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 你去田裡看水稻怎麼樣了.
What happened to the rice last time you went to the farm?

S.FORM: caho kaku piliso'.
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u kaku piɾiso~uʡ.
S.FORM: caho kaku piliso'.
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u kaku piɾiso~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: 我還沒有去看.
I haven't checked yet.

S.FORM: piala haca XXXX aku tuni kalitang la'enu nuya XXXX lopas.
S.PHON: piaɾa ħaʦa xxxx aku tuni kaɾitaŋ ɾaʡənu nuja xxxx ɾo~upas.
S.FORM: piala haca XXXX aku tuni kalitang la'enu nuya XXXX lopas.
S.PHON: piaɾa ħaʦa xxxx aku tuni kaɾitaŋ ɾaʡənu nuja xxxx ɾo~upas.
S.TRANSL: 只有去摘長豆,就在桃樹下.
I only picked the snap beans under the peach trees.

S.FORM: hay matini sa kalaorad latek ca'ay kafangcal ku heci nu panay sa ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: ħaj matini sa kaɾao~uraɬ~ɮ ɾatək ʦaʡaj kafaŋʦaɾ ku ħəʦi nu panaj sa ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.FORM: hay matini sa kalaorad latek ca'ay kafangcal ku heci nu panay sa ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: ħaj matini sa kaɾao~uraɬ~ɮ ɾatək ʦaʡaj kafaŋʦaɾ ku ħəʦi nu panaj sa ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 常常下雨的關係,可能稻子的果實不太好,我的想法.
Because of the frequent rain, probably the rice is not good. I think so.

S.FORM: anu masama'an ku misu a pinengneng tura panay sa ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: anu masamaʡan ku misu a pinəŋnəŋ tura panaj sa ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.FORM: anu masama'an ku misu a pinengneng tura panay sa ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: anu masamaʡan ku misu a pinəŋnəŋ tura panaj sa ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你看過稻子的想法如何,我的想法是這樣.
What do you think after seeing the rice? That's what I think.

S.FORM: hay a ma'anen ku fana' samaha'enmaha'en ku aniniay a miheca'an a.
S.PHON: ħaj a maʡanən ku fanaʡ samaħaʡənmaħaʡən ku aniniaj a miħəʦaʡan a.
S.FORM: hay a ma'anen ku fana' samaha'enmaha'en ku aniniay a miheca'an a.
S.PHON: ħaj a maʡanən ku fanaʡ samaħaʡənmaħaʡən ku aniniaj a miħəʦaʡan a.
S.TRANSL: 是,有什麼辦法呢,既然是這樣的季節.
Well, what can I do? The weather is like this.

S.FORM: a hiya nu nu nu rakat nu fali ita kira mamaha'en haca.
S.PHON: a ħija nu nu nu rakat nu faɾi ita kira mamaħaʡən ħaʦa.
S.FORM: a hiya nu nu nu rakat nu fali ita kira mamaha'en haca.
S.PHON: a ħija nu nu nu rakat nu faɾi ita kira mamaħaʡən ħaʦa.
S.TRANSL: 這就是氣候的變化,就是這樣的結果.
This is how the weather changes. This is the only way.

S.FORM: u roma satu sasuwalen aku matini u masadaktu ku panay.
S.PHON: u ro~uma satu sasuwaɾən aku matini u masaɬ~ɮaktu ku panaj.
S.FORM: u roma satu sasuwalen aku matini u masadaktu ku panay.
S.PHON: u ro~uma satu sasuwaɾən aku matini u masaɬ~ɮaktu ku panaj.
S.TRANSL: 其次我要說的是,稻子好像快出來了.
What I am going to say next is that probably the rice is going to mature.

S.FORM: latek itini i sakaenem a fulad.
S.PHON: ɾatək itini i sakaənəm a fuɾaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: latek itini i sakaenem a fulad.
S.PHON: ɾatək itini i sakaənəm a fuɾaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 大概在六月.
Maybe in June.

S.FORM: alatek a mipanaytu sa ku maku.
S.PHON: aɾatək a mipanajtu sa ku maku.
S.FORM: alatek a mipanaytu sa ku maku.
S.PHON: aɾatək a mipanajtu sa ku maku.
S.TRANSL: 可能就要割稻了,我判斷.
It is time to harvest, I think.

S.FORM: ta sulingaen ita ku malulalusidang a mipanay u pawutiwuti.
S.PHON: ta suɾiŋaən ita ku maɾuɾaɾusiɬ~ɮaŋ a mipanaj u pawutiwuti.
S.FORM: ta sulingaen ita ku malulalusidang a mipanay u pawutiwuti.
S.PHON: ta suɾiŋaən ita ku maɾuɾaɾusiɬ~ɮaŋ a mipanaj u pawutiwuti.
S.TRANSL: 我們開始整理,作為收割時的用品,用一袋袋的麻袋.
We should arrange the stuff for harvest, like sacks.

S.FORM: masadaktu i paputal sa ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: masaɬ~ɮaktu i paputaɾ sa ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.FORM: masadaktu i paputal sa ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: masaɬ~ɮaktu i paputaɾ sa ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 拿出來曬穀場外面,我的想法.
Take them out, I think.

S.FORM: hay maha'en ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: ħaj maħaʡən ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.FORM: hay maha'en ku maku harateng.
S.PHON: ħaj maħaʡən ku maku ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 是,我也這麼想.
Yeah, I think so, too.

S.FORM: anu mipanay satu kita haw i anu talacuwaen ita pawali kura panay.
S.PHON: anu mipanaj satu kita ħaw i anu taɾaʦuwaən ita pawaɾi kura panaj.
S.FORM: anu mipanay satu kita haw i anu talacuwaen ita pawali kura panay.
S.PHON: anu mipanaj satu kita ħaw i anu taɾaʦuwaən ita pawaɾi kura panaj.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們割稻了呢,不知道去哪裡烘乾.
If we reap the rice, where should we dry it?

S.FORM: anu tayraaw i nonghuei.
S.PHON: anu tajraaw i no~uŋħuəi.
S.FORM: anu tayraaw i nonghuei.
S.PHON: anu tajraaw i no~uŋħuəi.
S.TRANSL: 如果到農會呢?
What if we store it at the farmers' association?

S.FORM: anu itiraen itira ci papohan a mipawali.
S.PHON: anu itiraən itira ʦi papo~uħan a mipawaɾi.
S.FORM: anu itiraen itira ci papohan a mipawali.
S.PHON: anu itiraən itira ʦi papo~uħan a mipawaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 如果到Papoh家去晒呢?
How about drying it at Papoh's house?

S.FORM: u milicay kaku tu falucu' isu.
S.PHON: u miɾiʦaj kaku tu faɾuʦuʡ isu.
S.FORM: u milicay kaku tu falucu' isu.
S.PHON: u miɾiʦaj kaku tu faɾuʦuʡ isu.
S.TRANSL: 我要問問你的想法.
I am asking for your opinion.

S.FORM: maku harateng a simanay icuwatu malecadtu sa kaku ali.
S.PHON: maku ħaratəŋ a simanaj iʦuwatu maɾəʦaɬ~ɮtu sa kaku aɾi.
S.FORM: maku harateng a simanay icuwatu malecadtu sa kaku ali.
S.PHON: maku ħaratəŋ a simanaj iʦuwatu maɾəʦaɬ~ɮtu sa kaku aɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我的想法,無所謂,哪裡都是一樣的.
I think it doesn't matter. Everywhere is the same to me.

S.FORM: hay anu matira nga'aytu ku suwal isu e matini.
S.PHON: ħaj anu matira ŋaʡajtu ku suwaɾ isu ə matini.
S.FORM: hay anu matira nga'aytu ku suwal isu e matini.
S.PHON: ħaj anu matira ŋaʡajtu ku suwaɾ isu ə matini.
S.TRANSL: 如果你說的這樣可以.
If you say so, okay.

S.FORM: anu ma sulingatu ku suwal nu mita tatusa haw i a nga'ayay i ca kaitira ku i nukay ku nga'ay.
S.PHON: anu ma suɾiŋatu ku suwaɾ nu mita tatusa ħaw i a ŋaʡajaj i ʦa kaitira ku i nukaj ku ŋaʡaj.
S.FORM: anu ma sulingatu ku suwal nu mita tatusa haw i a nga'ayay i ca kaitira ku i nukay ku nga'ay.
S.PHON: anu ma suɾiŋatu ku suwaɾ nu mita tatusa ħaw i a ŋaʡajaj i ʦa kaitira ku i nukaj ku ŋaʡaj.
S.TRANSL: 把我們的話整理一下,我想在農會不是最好嗎?

TRANSL.notes: To sum up, wouldn't it be better if (we do it) at the farmers' association?

S.TRANSL: To sum up, wouldn't it be better if at the farmers' association?

S.FORM: catu pisaliawliaw a miolong sa ku falucu' nu maku.
S.PHON: ʦatu pisaɾiawɾiaw a mio~uɾo~uŋ sa ku faɾuʦuʡ nu maku.
S.FORM: catu pisaliawliaw a miolong sa ku falucu' nu maku.
S.PHON: ʦatu pisaɾiawɾiaw a mio~uɾo~uŋ sa ku faɾuʦuʡ nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 不用再扛來扛去的.
We don't have to carry them around, I think so.

S.FORM: ura saka a maha'en ku suwal aku milicay i tisuwanan.
S.PHON: ura saka a maħaʡən ku suwaɾ aku miɾiʦaj i tisuwanan.
S.FORM: ura saka a maha'en ku suwal aku milicay i tisuwanan.
S.PHON: ura saka a maħaʡən ku suwaɾ aku miɾiʦaj i tisuwanan.
S.TRANSL: 所以我想問問你的想法.
Therefore, I want to know your opinion.

S.FORM: maku wa a mipanay ca'ay pi patayra i nukay kira maku a panay.
S.PHON: maku wa a mipanaj ʦaʡaj pi patajra i nukaj kira maku a panaj.
S.FORM: maku wa a mipanay ca'ay pi patayra i nukay kira maku a panay.
S.PHON: maku wa a mipanaj ʦaʡaj pi patajra i nukaj kira maku a panaj.
S.TRANSL: 我割稻後稻子不會送到農會.
As for my rice, I won't store it at the farmer's association.

S.FORM: mmh acukemashan aku ci kapiyasan ni kakaenen itira.
S.PHON: mmħ aʦukəmasħan aku ʦi kapijasan ni kakaənən itira.
S.FORM: mmh acukemashan aku ci kapiyasan ni kakaenen itira.
S.PHON: mmħ aʦukəmasħan aku ʦi kapijasan ni kakaənən itira.
S.TRANSL: 我要吃的寄放在Kapiyas那裡.
I will leave my share at Kapiyas' place.

S.FORM: hay manga'aytu anu matira ku falucu' isu a.
S.PHON: ħaj maŋaʡajtu anu matira ku faɾuʦuʡ isu a.
S.FORM: hay manga'aytu anu matira ku falucu' isu a.
S.PHON: ħaj maŋaʡajtu anu matira ku faɾuʦuʡ isu a.
S.TRANSL: 是的,可以.如果你這樣想.
Well, that's okay, if that's what you think.

S.FORM: ma'anen ku pi hiyatu misu a falucu'.
S.PHON: maʡanən ku pi ħijatu misu a faɾuʦuʡ.
S.FORM: ma'anen ku pi hiyatu misu a falucu'.
S.PHON: maʡanən ku pi ħijatu misu a faɾuʦuʡ.

TRANSL.notes: 我不知道如何(改變)妳的心.

S.TRANSL: 我不知道如何 妳的心.
I don't know how to change your mind.

S.FORM: manga'aytu itira ci katay.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajtu itira ʦi kataj.
S.FORM: manga'aytu itira ci katay.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajtu itira ʦi kataj.
S.TRANSL: 放Katay那也好.
It's okay that you leave your portion at Katay's place.

S.FORM: san miala sa tu fulac ca'aytu karoray a mialatu malukakaenen tu itini i luma' a kura sa ku harateng manga'aytu maha'en ku falucu' isu.
S.PHON: san miaɾa sa tu fuɾaʦ ʦaʡajtu karo~uraj a miaɾatu maɾukakaənən tu itini i ɾumaʡ a kura sa ku ħaratəŋ maŋaʡajtu maħaʡən ku faɾuʦuʡ isu.
S.FORM: san miala sa tu fulac ca'aytu karoray a mialatu malukakaenen tu itini i luma' a kura sa ku harateng manga'aytu maha'en ku falucu' isu.
S.PHON: san miaɾa sa tu fuɾaʦ ʦaʡajtu karo~uraj a miaɾatu maɾukakaənən tu itini i ɾumaʡ a kura sa ku ħaratəŋ maŋaʡajtu maħaʡən ku faɾuʦuʡ isu.
S.TRANSL: 去拿的時候,去拿家裡要吃的糧食就不會很辛苦,這樣,既然你的意思是這樣.

TRANSL.notes: That won't be tiring when you (try to) get the food, if that's what you think.

S.TRANSL: That won't be tiring when you get the food, if that's what you think.

S.FORM: e matini ya nipalumaan tiya ropas haw.
S.PHON: ə matini ja nipaɾumaan tija ro~upas ħaw.
S.FORM: e matini ya nipalumaan tiya ropas haw.
S.PHON: ə matini ja nipaɾumaan tija ro~upas ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 現在我們種的那些桃子,....
The peaches that grow....

S.FORM: latek ca'aytu kasikul ita a tatusa uya nipalumaan a ropas smut satu a masmut.
S.PHON: ɾatək ʦaʡajtu kasikuɾ ita a tatusa uja nipaɾumaan a ro~upas smut satu a masmut.
S.FORM: latek ca'aytu kasikul ita a tatusa uya nipalumaan a ropas smut satu a masmut.
S.PHON: ɾatək ʦaʡajtu kasikuɾ ita a tatusa uja nipaɾumaan a ro~upas smut satu a masmut.
S.TRANSL: 可能我們種的那些桃樹我們倆很久沒有照顧,雜草叢生.
Perhaps we didn't take care of the peach trees we grew. There are weeds everywhere.

S.FORM: na tayratu kisu minengneng.
S.PHON: na tajratu kisu minəŋnəŋ.
S.FORM: na tayratu kisu minengneng.
S.PHON: na tajratu kisu minəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 你去看過了嗎?
Did you go and take a look?

S.FORM: u minengnengan aku uraw ka'etipay uya tusa tapanga.
S.PHON: u minəŋnəŋan aku uraw kaʡətipaj uja tusa tapaŋa.
S.FORM: u minengnengan aku uraw ka'etipay uya tusa tapanga.
S.PHON: u minəŋnəŋan aku uraw kaʡətipaj uja tusa tapaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 我看了西邊那二棵.
I took a look at those two in the west.

S.FORM: nengnenghan aku sakahangan sa.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan aku sakaħaŋan sa.
S.FORM: nengnenghan aku sakahangan sa.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan aku sakaħaŋan sa.
S.TRANSL: 我看整片都紅的.
I saw that they were all red.

S.FORM: tiwashan aku mapuhed tiwashan aku mapuhed awaay ku osaw nu faw a micucuk.
S.PHON: tiwasħan aku mapuħəɬ~ɮ tiwasħan aku mapuħəɬ~ɮ awaaj ku o~usaw nu faw a miʦuʦuk.
S.FORM: tiwashan aku mapuhed tiwashan aku mapuhed awaay ku osaw nu faw a micucuk.
S.PHON: tiwasħan aku mapuħəɬ~ɮ tiwasħan aku mapuħəɬ~ɮ awaaj ku o~usaw nu faw a miʦuʦuk.
S.TRANSL: 敲下一個爛一個,敲下一個爛一個,沒有不被蟲叮的.
They were all rotten; the rest were infested with worms.

S.FORM: pakunirahantu aku kira.
S.PHON: pakuniraħantu aku kira.
S.FORM: pakunirahantu aku kira.
S.PHON: pakuniraħantu aku kira.
S.TRANSL: 我就這樣放著不管.
I didn't manage to deal with it.

S.FORM: hay u ca'ay ka paiw nu mita u mamatiratira haca mafaw.
S.PHON: ħaj u ʦaʡaj ka paiw nu mita u mamatiratira ħaʦa mafaw.
S.FORM: hay u ca'ay ka paiw nu mita u mamatiratira haca mafaw.
S.PHON: ħaj u ʦaʡaj ka paiw nu mita u mamatiratira ħaʦa mafaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有噴藥,那樣子所以長蟲.
We didn't spray pesticides, so the worms grew.

S.FORM: tayra kiya maku inacila i takuliaw a minengneng.
S.PHON: tajra kija maku inaʦiɾa i takuɾiaw a minəŋnəŋ.
S.FORM: tayra kiya maku inacila i takuliaw a minengneng.
S.PHON: tajra kija maku inaʦiɾa i takuɾiaw a minəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天去takuliaw看過.
I went to Takuliaw yesterday to check.

S.FORM: su'elin ca'ay kafangcal ku heci nu lopas anini tuna mehica'an kalafaw.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin ʦaʡaj kafaŋʦaɾ ku ħəʦi nu ɾo~upas anini tuna məħiʦaʡan kaɾafaw.
S.FORM: su'elin ca'ay kafangcal ku heci nu lopas anini tuna mehica'an kalafaw.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin ʦaʡaj kafaŋʦaɾ ku ħəʦi nu ɾo~upas anini tuna məħiʦaʡan kaɾafaw.
S.TRANSL: 真的今年的桃子的果實不好,都長蟲.
The peaches this year are not really good. So many worms.

S.FORM: hatiyatiya ca'ay ka pi paiw kita urasaka ca'ay kanga'ay ku heci nang ningra.
S.PHON: ħatijatija ʦaʡaj ka pi paiw kita urasaka ʦaʡaj kaŋaʡaj ku ħəʦi naŋ niŋra.
S.FORM: hatiyatiya ca'ay ka pi paiw kita urasaka ca'ay kanga'ay ku heci nang ningra.
S.PHON: ħatijatija ʦaʡaj ka pi paiw kita urasaka ʦaʡaj kaŋaʡaj ku ħəʦi naŋ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 那樣子,我們沒有噴藥,所以他的果實不好.
Well, we didn't spray pesticides, so his fruits are not good.

S.FORM: ira kiya ni alaan aku inacila i.
S.PHON: ira kija ni aɾaan aku inaʦiɾa i.
S.FORM: ira kiya ni alaan aku inacila i.
S.PHON: ira kija ni aɾaan aku inaʦiɾa i.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天有去採.
I picked some yesterday.

S.FORM: maedeng ca pakamutep kiya kiya fangcalay ku heci.
S.PHON: maəɬ~ɮəŋ ʦa pakamutəp kija kija faŋʦaɾaj ku ħəʦi.
S.FORM: maedeng ca pakamutep kiya kiya fangcalay ku heci.
S.PHON: maəɬ~ɮəŋ ʦa pakamutəp kija kija faŋʦaɾaj ku ħəʦi.
S.TRANSL: 差不多不到十個好的.
The good ones were less than ten.

S.FORM: falahantu isu.
S.PHON: faɾaħantu isu.
S.FORM: falahantu isu.
S.PHON: faɾaħantu isu.
S.TRANSL: 你丟了嗎?
Did you throw them away?

S.FORM: ca'ayay maala ku panukay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajaj maaɾa ku panukaj.
S.FORM: ca'ayay maala ku panukay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajaj maaɾa ku panukaj.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有拿回來.
I didn't bring them back here.

S.FORM: XXXX anuhoni anu masama'antu anu mami culu' kita tu 'amutu.
S.PHON: xxxx anuħo~uni anu masamaʡantu anu mami ʦuɾuʡ kita tu ʡamutu.
S.FORM: XXXX anuhoni anu masama'antu anu mami culu' kita tu 'amutu.
S.PHON: xxxx anuħo~uni anu masamaʡantu anu mami ʦuɾuʡ kita tu ʡamutu.
S.TRANSL: 等一下看怎麼樣,我們要去運水泥時.

TRANSL.notes: (Let's see) later, when we go to carry the concrete.

S.TRANSL: later, when we go to carry the concrete.

S.FORM: hay u ruma satu a sasuwalen aku ura putaw iraaw uya nipaluma'an.
S.PHON: ħaj u ruma satu a sasuwaɾən aku ura putaw iraaw uja nipaɾumaʡan.
S.FORM: hay u ruma satu a sasuwalen aku ura putaw iraaw uya nipaluma'an.
S.PHON: ħaj u ruma satu a sasuwaɾən aku ura putaw iraaw uja nipaɾumaʡan.
S.TRANSL: 是的,其次我要說的是那裡種的葡萄.
Right. Another thing that I want to mention is the grapes that we planted.

S.FORM: munengawtu kuya hiya ira ci falu XXXX cicu'ongtu kuya kuya putaw.
S.PHON: munəŋawtu kuja ħija ira ʦi faɾu xxxx ʦiʦuʡo~uŋtu kuja kuja putaw.
S.FORM: munengawtu kuya hiya ira ci falu XXXX cicu'ongtu kuya kuya putaw.
S.PHON: munəŋawtu kuja ħija ira ʦi faɾu xxxx ʦiʦuʡo~uŋtu kuja kuja putaw.

TRANSL.notes: 長出來了,開花(這裡語誤),出芽了,那個葡萄.

S.TRANSL: 長出來了,開花 ,出芽了,那個葡萄.
The grapes sprouted.

S.FORM: alahantu aku kuya kuhtingay satahepu tuya lukut.
S.PHON: aɾaħantu aku kuja kuħtiŋaj sataħəpu tuja ɾukut.
S.FORM: alahantu aku kuya kuhtingay satahepu tuya lukut.
S.PHON: aɾaħantu aku kuja kuħtiŋaj sataħəpu tuja ɾukut.
S.TRANSL: 我帶了覆蓋山蘇的黑布幔.
I took a piece of black cloth to cover the plant.

S.FORM: nga'ay patu'urhantu ni hiya tu XXXX u safang saka ku kira.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj patuʡurħantu ni ħija tu xxxx u safaŋ saka ku kira.
S.FORM: nga'ay patu'urhantu ni hiya tu XXXX u safang saka ku kira.
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj patuʡurħantu ni ħija tu xxxx u safaŋ saka ku kira.
S.TRANSL: 可以把它舖上作為網子,我這樣想.
We can do it this way. As a net, I think.

S.FORM: manga'aytu ira ku safang itira i luma'.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajtu ira ku safaŋ itira i ɾumaʡ.
S.FORM: manga'aytu ira ku safang itira i luma'.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajtu ira ku safaŋ itira i ɾumaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 可以的話,家裡有網子.
There is a net at home.

S.FORM: anu ca sapima'an ni lekal kuya safang alaantu ka patayni ta sangaantu ita kura rangra nura putaw sa ku falucu' aku.
S.PHON: anu ʦa sapimaʡan ni ɾəkaɾ kuja safaŋ aɾaantu ka patajni ta saŋaantu ita kura raŋra nura putaw sa ku faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.FORM: anu ca sapima'an ni lekal kuya safang alaantu ka patayni ta sangaantu ita kura rangra nura putaw sa ku falucu' aku.
S.PHON: anu ʦa sapimaʡan ni ɾəkaɾ kuja safaŋ aɾaantu ka patajni ta saŋaantu ita kura raŋra nura putaw sa ku faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.TRANSL: 如果lekal沒有拿去幹麻的話.把它拿來,我們作葡萄的棚子,我這樣想.
If Lekal didn't take it, we'll use it as a shed for the grapes. That's what I think.

S.FORM: ta u roma satu icila mi ala ci mayaw tura suta' itira i ni kuocintien kyami.
S.PHON: ta u ro~uma satu iʦiɾa mi aɾa ʦi majaw tura sutaʡ itira i ni kuo~uʦintiən kjami.
S.FORM: ta u roma satu icila mi ala ci mayaw tura suta' itira i ni kuocintien kyami.
S.PHON: ta u ro~uma satu iʦiɾa mi aɾa ʦi majaw tura sutaʡ itira i ni kuo~uʦintiən kjami.
S.TRANSL: 另外,上次mayaw買了地在郭金田那,不是嗎?
Didn't Mayaw purchase a piece of land there at Kuo Chintien's?

S.FORM: kala'enu na kasapad.
S.PHON: kaɾaʡənu na kasapaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: kala'enu na kasapad.
S.PHON: kaɾaʡənu na kasapaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 在Kasapad他們的下面.
Below Kasapad's.

S.FORM: mmh ma'ecitu aku ci kuocintienan ku payci tu ipan sa'an.
S.PHON: mmħ maʡəʦitu aku ʦi kuo~uʦintiənan ku pajʦi tu ipan saʡan.
S.FORM: mmh ma'ecitu aku ci kuocintienan ku payci tu ipan sa'an.
S.PHON: mmħ maʡəʦitu aku ʦi kuo~uʦintiənan ku pajʦi tu ipan saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 我把錢寄給郭金田了,寄了一半.
I have sent money to Kuo Chintien, half of it.

S.FORM: anucila maharektu kura siokencio ta patayra haca kaku tu payci.
S.PHON: anuʦiɾa maħarəktu kura sio~ukənʦio~u ta patajra ħaʦa kaku tu pajʦi.
S.FORM: anucila maharektu kura siokencio ta patayra haca kaku tu payci.
S.PHON: anuʦiɾa maħarəktu kura sio~ukənʦio~u ta patajra ħaʦa kaku tu pajʦi.
S.TRANSL: 過幾天等到處理完所有權狀後,我還要再拿錢過去.
A few days later when the title deed is done, I will pay the balance.

S.FORM: latek minukay kami itiya sa kira.
S.PHON: ɾatək minukaj kami itija sa kira.
S.FORM: latek minukay kami itiya sa kira.
S.PHON: ɾatək minukaj kami itija sa kira.
S.TRANSL: 可能我們那時候回來.
We will probably come back then.

S.FORM: sakapina a fulad kura sapinukay nira.
S.PHON: sakapina a fuɾaɬ~ɮ kura sapinukaj nira.
S.FORM: sakapina a fulad kura sapinukay nira.
S.PHON: sakapina a fuɾaɬ~ɮ kura sapinukaj nira.
S.TRANSL: 她們大概是幾月回來?
In which month are they coming back?

S.FORM: XXXX unini a fulad kiya.
S.PHON: xxxx unini a fuɾaɬ~ɮ kija.
S.FORM: XXXX unini a fulad kiya.
S.PHON: xxxx unini a fuɾaɬ~ɮ kija.
S.TRANSL: 就是這個月.
This month.

S.FORM: tuna sakaenem.
S.PHON: tuna sakaənəm.
S.FORM: tuna sakaenem.
S.PHON: tuna sakaənəm.
S.TRANSL: 這個六月嗎?
This June?

S.FORM: hay tuna sakaenem sakalima ka.
S.PHON: ħaj tuna sakaənəm sakaɾima ka.
S.FORM: hay tuna sakaenem sakalima ka.
S.PHON: ħaj tuna sakaənəm sakaɾima ka.
S.TRANSL: 是,這個六月,或是五月.
Right, this June, or probably May.

S.FORM: XXXX sostala uya suwal isu icila e anu matira mama'acatu ni mayaw kura suta'.
S.PHON: xxxx so~ustaɾa uja suwaɾ isu iʦiɾa ə anu matira mamaʡaʦatu ni majaw kura sutaʡ.
S.FORM: XXXX sostala uya suwal isu icila e anu matira mama'acatu ni mayaw kura suta'.
S.PHON: xxxx so~ustaɾa uja suwaɾ isu iʦiɾa ə anu matira mamaʡaʦatu ni majaw kura sutaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 所以你那次提過的,Mayaw買了那塊地後,....
So last time you mentioned that Mayaw already bought that piece of land.

S.FORM: anu tayra sa kita mifunsia sa kuya suwal isu.
S.PHON: anu tajra sa kita mifunsia sa kuja suwaɾ isu.
S.FORM: anu tayra sa kita mifunsia sa kuya suwal isu.
S.PHON: anu tajra sa kita mifunsia sa kuja suwaɾ isu.
S.TRANSL: 我們去噴藥,妳這樣說過.
We are going to spray pesticides. That is what you said.

S.FORM: anu fangcaltu ku rumi'ad haw i tayra satu kita mifunsia sa kuna niharatengantu aku.
S.PHON: anu faŋʦaɾtu ku rumiʡaɬ~ɮ ħaw i tajra satu kita mifunsia sa kuna niħaratəŋantu aku.
S.FORM: anu fangcaltu ku rumi'ad haw i tayra satu kita mifunsia sa kuna niharatengantu aku.
S.PHON: anu faŋʦaɾtu ku rumiʡaɬ~ɮ ħaw i tajra satu kita mifunsia sa kuna niħaratəŋantu aku.
S.TRANSL: 看什麼時候天氣好,我們去噴藥,我是這樣子想.
When the weather is good, we'll go there to spray pesticides. That's what I think.

S.FORM: anu awa ku limaw isu aka pacici maketeraw ka'emangay wawa saka ku kira.
S.PHON: anu awa ku ɾimaw isu aka paʦiʦi makətəraw kaʡəmaŋaj wawa saka ku kira.
S.FORM: anu awa ku limaw isu aka pacici maketeraw ka'emangay wawa saka ku kira.
S.PHON: anu awa ku ɾimaw isu aka paʦiʦi makətəraw kaʡəmaŋaj wawa saka ku kira.
S.TRANSL: 如果沒有時間不要勉強,妳的小孩會罵.
If you do not have time, we will not force you. Your child will be angry.

S.FORM: u mima'an haca tu masamatini awa ku tatayalen tu masamatini manga'aytu tayra mifunsia sa kaku.
S.PHON: u mimaʡan ħaʦa tu masamatini awa ku tatajaɾən tu masamatini maŋaʡajtu tajra mifunsia sa kaku.
S.FORM: u mima'an haca tu masamatini awa ku tatayalen tu masamatini manga'aytu tayra mifunsia sa kaku.
S.PHON: u mimaʡan ħaʦa tu masamatini awa ku tatajaɾən tu masamatini maŋaʡajtu tajra mifunsia sa kaku.
S.TRANSL: 這時候有什麼事,沒有什麼要忙的啊,我想還是去噴藥好了.
There is nothing to do. We will go there to spray pesticides.
